rationale: Subject is a single townhome unit enclosed by the orange dashed bounding box (~192 × 250 px). At 0.1879 ft/px this yields a bounding box of ~36.1 ft × 47.0 ft = 1,697 sq ft. A hip-roof fill factor of ~83% gives a plan-view footprint of ~1,410 sq ft. The roof is a classic four-plane hip with no gable ends or valleys; all four sides terminate in eaves. Ridge runs east–west estimated at ~19 ft; four hip lines totaling ~88 ft; perimeter eaves ~166 ft. Confidence is moderate (0.57) due to partial tree canopy overlap at the south end of the subject roof and uncertainty about any small front-porch overhang.
